markdown:
1. PARKING AREAS SHALL COMPLY WITH PHOENIX MUNI CODE SECTION 702 2. TRASH & RECYCLE ENCLOSURES SHALL COMPLY WITH CITY OF PHOENIX PWD STANDARD DETAIL 3. PERIMETER FENCES SHALL COMPLY WITH PMC SECTIONS 507 & 703 4. ALL OCCUPIED BUILDINGS OVER 600 SF SHALL BE PROVIDED WITH AUTOMATIC FIRE SPRINKLER SYSTEM PER PFC 903.1 5. VERIFY ALL EXISTNG PAVING ELEVATIONS WITH CIVIL DRAWINGS 6. REFER TO PORTABLE TRAILER MANUFACTURER DRAWINGS FOR PORTABLE RESTROOM AND SHOWER FACILITIES 7. FIELD VERIFY FINISH FLOOR ELEVATIONS WITH GRADING PLAN 8. REFER TO COVER SHEET FOR CODE ANALYSIS 9. PROVIDE PANIC HARDWARE AT ALL PERIMETER ACCESS GATES USED FOR EGRESS 10. REFER TO CIVIL DRAWINGS FOR TRAFFIC BOLLARD LOCATIONS AND DETAILS 11. ACCESS TO STORAGE CONTAINERS WILL BE CONTROLLED BY STAFF. STAFF WILL ACCESS AMENITIES & PERSONAL BELONGINGS FOR THE RESIDENTS; RESIDENTS WILL NOT HAVE ACCESS TO STORAGE CONTAINERS. 12. ALL DOORS AND GATES SHALL BE ACCESSIBLE AND SHALL BE PROVIDED WITH ACCESSIBLE MANEUVERING CLEARANCES PER 2010 ADA STANDARDS, HARDWARE AND OPERABLE PARTS MOUNTED BETWEEN 34"–44" PER 2010 ADA STANDARDS WITH OPENING FORCE <5 LBS PER IBC 11B-309.4. REFER TO DOOR SCHEDULE FOR ADDITIONAL INFORMATION. 13. CONSTRUCT 4” CONC. SLAB UNDER ALL PREFAB. METAL STAIRS, RAMPS AND DECKS 14. ELECTRICAL TRANSFORMER AND FIRELINE BACKFLOW PREVENTER SHALL BE SCREENED WITH 3'-0" HIGH WALL WITH SHRUBS @ 5'-0" ON CENTER PER PMC 507 TAB A. 15. LIGHT POLES SHALL NOT LOCATED WITHIN REQUIRED PARKING LOT LANDSCAPE ISLANDS PER PMC 507 TAB A. 16. TOTAL BEDS AND UNITS PROPOSED ARE 264, NUMBER OF RESIDENTS SHALL NOT EXCEED 300 PER STIPULATION 1 OF ZA-734-23 GENERAL NOTES NO SCALE 4 A. DEVELOPMENT AND USE OF THIS SITE WILL CONFORM WITH ALL APPLICABLE CODES AND ORDINANCES B. THIS PROJECT IS LOCATED IN THE CITY OF PHOENIX WATER SERVICES AREA AND HAS BEEN DESIGNATED AS HAVING AN ASSURED WATER SUPPLY C. ALL NEW OR RELOCATED UTILITIES WILL BE PLACED UNDERGROUND D. STRUCTURES AND LANDSCAPING WITHIN A TRIANGLE MEASURED BACK 10' FROM THE PROPERTY LINE AN D20' ALONG THE PROPERTY LINE ON EACH SIDE OF THE DRIVEWAYS ENTRANCES WILL BE MAINTAINED AT A MAXIMUM HEIGHT OF 3' E. STRUCTURES AND LANDSCAPING WITHIN A TRIANGLE MEASURING 33' X 33' ALONG THE PROPERTY LINES WILL BE MAINTAINED AT A MAXIMUM HEIGHT OF 3' F. ANY LIGHTING WILL BE PLACED SO AS TO DIRECT LIGHT AWAY FROM ADJACENT RESIDENTIAL DISTRICTS AND WILL BO EXCEED ONE FOOT-CANDLE AT THE PROPERTY LINE. NO NOISE, ODOR OR VIBRATION WILL BE EMITTED AT ANY LEVEL EXCEEDING THE GENERAL LEVEL OF NOISE, ODOR OR VIBRATION EMITTED BY USES IN THAT AREA OUTSIDE OF THE SITE G. OWNERS OF THE PROPERTY ADJACENT TO PUBLIC RIGHTS-OF-WAY WILL HAVE THE RESPONSIBILITY FOR MAINTAINING ALL LANDSCAPING LOCATED WITHIN THE RIGHTS-OF-WAY, IN ACCORDANCE WITH APPROVED PLANS H. ALL ROOFTOP EQUIPMENT AND SATELLITE DISHES SHALL BE SCREENED TO THE HEIGHT OF THE TALLEST EQUIPMENT I. ALL SERVICE AREAS SHALL BE SCREENED TO CONCEAL TRASH CONTAINERS, LOADING DOCKS, TRANSFORMERS, BACKFLOW PREVENTERS AND OTHER MECHANICAL OR ELECTRICAL EQUIPMENT FROM EYE LEVEL ADJACENT TO ALL PUBLIC STREETS J. BARBED, RAZOR, OR CONCERTINA WIRE (OR SIMILAR) SHALL NOT BE USED ON THIS SITE WHERE VISIBLE FROM PUBLIC STREETS OR ADJACENT RESIDENTIAL AREAS K. ALL SIGNAGE REQUIRES SEPARATE REVIEWS, APPROVALS, AND PERMITS. NO SIGNS ARE APPROVED PER THIS PLAN PHOENIX GENERAL SITE PLAN NOTES NO SCALE 5
PARKING AND LOADING
TOTAL PARKING REQUIRED (1: 1,000 SF)43
TOTAL OFFICE PARKING REQUIRED (1: 300 SF)10
TOTAL PARKING PROVIDED57
ADA PARKING REQUIRED (1:25)2
ADA PARKING PROVIDED3
PASSENGER LOADING REQUIRED / PROVIDED1
TOTAL ASPHALT PARKING AREA13,494 SF
PARKING AREA LANDSCAPE REQUIRED PER 507 TAB A (5%)675 SF
PARKING AREA LANDSCAPE PROVIDED690 SF

LFE:1035.75, LAG:1035.25. * **Men's Dorm:** 80' x 105', 100 BEDS, 8,400 GSF. LFE:1035.50, LAG:1035.00. * **Women's Dorm:** 80' x 105', 100 BEDS, 8,400 GSF. LFE:1036.00, LAG:1035.50. **Parking Areas:** * **Staff & Visitor Parking:** (35 SPACES). * **Staff & Visitor Parking:** (7 SPACES). * **Safe RV Parking Area:** (14 SPACES). **Other Site Features:** * **Proposed Detention Basin:** RE. CIVIL DRAWINGS. LFE:1036.00, LAG:1035.50. * **Recreation Area:** Two distinct areas are labeled as such. * **Activity Area & Community Garden** * **Shaded Seating** * **Dog Run:** LFE:1034.53, LAG:1034.03. * **Building and Landscape Setback:** -0". * **Ewalk Easement** **Annotations and Callouts:** * Numerous numbered circles (1 through 44) indicate various details or notes on the plan. * LFE (Lowest Floor Elevation) and LAG (Lowest Adjacent Grade) values are provided for several areas and structures. * Dimensions and distances are indicated throughout the plan, such as 126'-7", 54'-5", 193'-8", 26'-0", 129'-10", 18'-0", 40'-0", 90'-5", 235'-3", 91'-0", 110'-8". * One Way indicators for internal circulation. **North Arrow:** A north arrow with 'N' is present. **Scale Bar:** A graphic scale bar is provided, showing increments of 0', 10', 40', 50', and 100'. The numerical scale is 1"=40'-0".::> SITE PLAN SCALE <::scale: A graphic scale bar is provided, showing increments of 0', 10', 40', 50', and 100'. The numerical scale is 1"=40'-0".::>
